title: trisetum flavescens subsp. serbicum
intro: Trisetum flavescens subsp. serbicum, also known as Serbian false brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trisetum flavescens subsp. serbicum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
